textByHash.0f1a9165e823e4d86b1a71cdf2c119b3c6cd3ccd: The whetstone is for more advanced smithing, but I could let you use it as well as my anvils if you could get me some more materials.
textByHash.0faa1b3d5c58d4ad46016cc58c20d2e3b7d349ba: Oh well, you could practice mining until you can. Can't beat a bit of mining - it's a useful skill. Failing that, you might be able to find a more experienced adventurer to buy the iron ore off.
textByHash.1f0ed384781781958a6bee066fb750211231f6f7: You'll be able to find all those ores in the rocks just inside the Dwarven Mine. Head east from here and you'll find the entrance in the side of Ice Mountain.
textByHash.262a816cfc2417474de26e4848f75e481ae7c73b: I make pickaxes. I am the best maker of pickaxes in the whole of Gielinor.
textByHash.2ab4993bb6057af1f7ad2bde50769cce1a01fd12: Clay is what I use more than anything, to make casts. Could you get me 6 clay, 4 copper ore, and 2 iron ore, please? I could pay a little, and let you use my anvils. Take this pickaxe with you just in case you need it.
textByHash.2e8c9504b12ad361a0650ba30f20885fe028de62: Sorry, but I've got a running order with Nurmof.
textByHash.415f1200f72e484752bed0a34955261451cbd0da: Hello traveller, how is your metalworking coming along?
textByHash.499ddddc3601fab37c10ac05c4e1a9fe21fd98cd: Yep, the entrance is in the side of Ice Mountain just to the east of here. They're a friendly bunch. Stop in at Nurmof's store and buy one of my pickaxes!
textByHash.4b106a7fec45e8b514eaf5b18d61c34ea724e44a: Not to worry, stick at it. Remember, I need 6 clay, 4 copper ore, and 2 iron ore.
textByHash.4bf170f4c57bf182b5a3490c846183bb6bb6a1c8: I don't quite understand what you're saying?
textByHash.539ab301da35d950e64fdfd59ebcc20fd66c7865: Hello traveller, what brings you to my humble smithy?
textByHash.55d741a74124a67e893dc3ce1c774d2e60ab1391: Nurmof has a store over in the Dwarven Mine. You can find the entrance on the side of Ice Mountain to the east of here.
textByHash.5d5c195a22486c7e6f18f2dfe0694a85dd477332: Many thanks! Pass them here, please. I can spare you some coins for your trouble, and please use my anvils any time you want.
textByHash.6a4c385fad2d8aff78f46091268f545d087d03c1: Oh my, that is a coincidence! Pass them here, please. I can spare you some coins for your trouble, and please use my anvils any time you want.
textByHash.7b005784e06e23ae2d48435ef02eba71740635ab: So, you've come to the right place?
textByHash.7e6a955c7ddf488b0fe620adbbc384179d506cce: Have you got my materials yet, traveller?
textByHash.82335ff454518dee937c08669cd6d53744c9dd6e: My anvils get enough work with my own use. I make pickaxes, and it takes a lot of hard work. If you could get me some more materials, then I could let you use them.
textByHash.9deab2a2d1a872ed48062258cccdd4f1e4dd7ab9: How nice to meet someone with such pleasant manners. Do come again when you need to shout at someone smaller than you!
textByHash.aa1eb84cd59ccde29700f2602094b4dc38453b19: If you could get me some more materials then I could let you use them.
textByHash.b44a9ffa902485edea45154bcebfe8466d384bbe: Hope you like it. I do enjoy the solitude of my little home. If you get time, please say hi to my friends in the Dwarven Mine.
textByHash.e73580f4b58d6ad5a0680ceee573fd97a704eee9: Good, the love of metal is a thing close to my heart.
textByHash.f977e63f8903e2ca9e7f4d3113bb6e18b633d23b: Hey, who said you could use that? My anvils get enough work with my own use. I make pickaxes, and it takes a lot of hard work.
textByHash.ffab343f256957751a854ec3736eb06e18b764f7: That is your choice. Nice to meet you anyway.
